SELECT period, to_centuries(period) AS century_interval FROM centuries_test;
SELECT (SELECT to_centuries(period) FROM centuries_test WHERE period = 5) AS century_result;
SELECT t.period, to_centuries(t.period) AS century_interval FROM centuries_test t WHERE t.period >= 0 ORDER BY t.period;
WITH age_groups AS (SELECT period, to_centuries(period) AS century_interval FROM centuries_test) SELECT * FROM age_groups WHERE century_interval < 2;
SELECT a.extra_period, to_centuries(a.extra_period) AS century_interval FROM additional_centuries a JOIN centuries_test b ON a.extra_period = b.period;
SELECT period, COUNT(*) FROM centuries_test GROUP BY to_centuries(period);
